user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] System detected Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected for account Adatum Corporation. Generating output.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-06 12:27 EST
Subject: Re: account health Discussion - Next Steps

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about account health. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
Date: 2024-02-10 15:50 EST
Subject: Follow-up: account health Review

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with account health. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-13 11:21 EST
Subject: account health - Action Required

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with account health. What are the next steps from your side?

Meeting: account health Discussion - Adatum Corporation
Date: 2024-03-08
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation), Raj Mehta (Microsoft)

[00:01:15] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is account health.

[00:05:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on vendor dependencies and found that the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around.

[00:09:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about vendor dependencies. Can we address those?

[00:13:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): On the account health front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around performance requirements.

[00:17:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): On the account health front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around data residency.

[00:20:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about stakeholder alignment. Can we address those?

[00:25:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): The timeline for security compliance is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:29:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is cost optimization.

[00:33:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on data residency and found that the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk.
